title: Infosys extends strategic collaboration with AGCO for IT infrastructure and HR operations transformation
detailed_summary: Infosys announced on July 22, 2025 that it has extended its strategic collaboration with AGCO Corporation for a new engagement covering IT infrastructure and HR operations. The work is intended to create a more efficient and future-ready operational framework for AGCO, with stated goals including enhanced user experience, standardized processes, cost reductions, scalable tools and automation. Infosys will use capabilities including Infosys Polycloud, Infosys Cobalt and Infosys Topaz, including generative AI for knowledge management, problem analysis, categorization and incident resolution. The document does not disclose contract value, duration, revenue impact, margin impact or financial guidance.
